历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 35077 → 119754 (anomalous drop in 2022) → 36540 → 28637 → 44843. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the rankings have shifted backward in recent years: 2023: 36540 → 2024: 28637 (moved forward) → 2025: 44843 (significantly moved backward by about 16206 places), with a baseline ranking of approximately 44843 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 2021: 235 → 2022: 239 → 2023: 239 → 2024: 251 → 2025: 264 → 2026: 338. In 2026, there is an increase of 74 students (+28%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically would push the ranking number higher (increased competition), but the number of examinees is also expanding simultaneously, so actual competitive pressure remains unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 55th, with a slight decline in recent years (2021: 52nd → 2026: 55th), overall level stable; reputation evaluation in 2023 is neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident); no significant negative public opinion in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking 102nd, evaluation 'average', short video exposure is low, application attention is stable. No record of admission line anomalies; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, strong competitiveness in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Data Science continue to have high rankings (2025 min_rank approximately 16,000–20,000), Animal Medicine (Veterinary Medicine A-) is relatively popular; the total number of examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is approximately 1.2 million (uncertain), significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025 for physics + history categories, intensifying competition; the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch score is 427, with little fluctuation in recent years; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Henan examinees; the university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (2026: 338 science + 47 arts = 385), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the 28% enrollment expansion in 2026 but the simultaneous significant increase in the total number of examinees in Henan Province, stable university reputation, and the appeal of agricultural and forestry advantageous disciplines to specific examinees, the estimated minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 52584, with a range of 52084–53084.
